channel.description: Networking DIY Challenge Labs Lab 15-1: Add New Interface and Configure Connection Profile with nmcli Add a third network interface to rhel9server40 in VirtualBox. As user1 with sudo on server40, run ip a and verify the addition of the new interface. Use the nmcli command and assign IP 192.168.0.40/24 and gateway 192.168.0.1 [root@server40 ~]# nmcli c a type Ethernet ifname enp0s8 con-name enp0s8 ip4 192.168.0.40/24 gw4 192.168.0.1 Deactivate and reactivate this connection manually.
